role: This directory contains all template definitions for the ArchSpine mirror system, including foundational documentation, AI prompt schemas, architectural rules, and view inventories.
responsibility: Collectively, these templates define the core structural and behavioral contracts of the ArchSpine system, providing reusable blueprints for mirroring documentation, generating structured AI outputs, enforcing architecture constraints, and assessing codebase health.

children.role: This directory contains the foundational documentation and templates for the ArchSpine mirror system, defining its purpose, configuration, and architectural contracts.
Directory providing prompt template schemas, rendering utilities, and examples for generating structured architecture diagrams and semantic summaries within the ArchSpine system.
Defines the architectural constraints and naming conventions for the ArchSpine codebase.
Aggregates auto-generated inventories and risk assessments of the project's public interface and codebase health.
